title: Pipez Industrial
description: Replaces the default Pipez textures with sleek metal frames and seamless connection logic for a more solid factory aesthetic!
body:
Pipez Industrial is a visual overhaul for the [Pipez](https://modrinth.com/mod/pipez) mod by henkelmax.

This resource pack replaces the default textures with a more rugged, heavy-duty industrial style. Redesigned the pipes with solid metal frames and refined core colors to give your automation lines a sense of weight and power!
